title: DevSecOps Engineer
description:
Job Title

DevSecOps Engineer

Job Overview

We are looking for a skilled DevSecOps Engineer to join our team and drive the implementation of secure, automated, and scalable cloud infrastructure within a government environment. The role requires close collaboration with development and operations teams to ensure cloud systems are robust, compliant, and efficient.

Responsibilities

  • Develop, implement, and maintain cloud security frameworks, policies, and processes

  • Automate cloud operations to enhance efficiency, scalability, and security

  • Write and manage Terraform scripts for infrastructure management, including tasks such as:

    • Updating IP addresses

    • Modifying API Gateway WAF rules

    • Configuring Route 53 settings

  • Ensure cloud environments are secure, continuously monitored, and compliant with relevant standards

  • Collaborate with development teams to implement secure CI/CD pipelines

  • Conduct audits and monitor cloud resources to identify and remediate potential vulnerabilities

  • Deploy and maintain cloud security tools, including AWS security services and third-party solutions

  • Continuously review and update security policies to address emerging threats and maintain compliance

Required Skills & Experience

  • Proven experience in DevSecOps and cloud security practices

  • Hands-on experience establishing cloud security processes and automation pipelines

  • Strong expertise in AWS services and CLI usage

  • Proficient in Terraform for managing and automating cloud infrastructure

  • Experience automating tasks such as IP management, WAF rules, and DNS configurations

  • Deep understanding of cloud security best practices, compliance requirements, and risk mitigation

  • Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and problem-solving abilities

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience in government systems or familiarity with IM8 compliance standards

  • Relevant certifications such as:

    • AWS Certified Security – Specialty

    • AWS Certified Solutions Architect

    • DevSecOps or cloud security certifications

  • Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD frameworks

Personal Attributes

  • Excellent communication and teamwork skills

  • Able to work independently and take ownership of tasks

  • Detail-oriented, proactive, and solution-focused

    We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
